class.name: ScenePaint2DEditor
class.brief_description: Class for interacting with the 2D editor's Scene Paint Mode.
class.description: This class is available only in the editor and cannot be instantiated. Access it using [method EditorInterface.get_scene_paint_2d]. It provides methods for editor plugins to interact with the scene painting tool. Plugins can register custom scene providers, and set the scene to be painted.

method.name: get_painted_scene
method.description: Returns the painted scene, or [code]null[/code] if none is selected. The returned scene's properties can be edited. [b]Warning:[/b] Removing and freeing this node will render the editor useless and may cause a crash.

method.name: register_scene_provider
method.description: Registers a custom scene provider. When the scene picker tool is active and the user clicks on [param control], the [param callback] is invoked and must return a [Node2D]. The returned scene becomes the new painting sample.

method.name: set_painted_scene
method.description: Sets the scene sample to be painted.

method.name: unregister_scene_provider
method.description: Removes a previously registered scene provider.
